name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, parameter, or behavior change
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What you want

<!-- One-line description. e.g. "Add a `pair_diff` tool that shows changes between two pair sessions." -->

## Why it would help

<!-- The use case in plain language. What problem does this solve that the current tools don't?
     Concrete scenario beats abstract benefit. -->

## What you've tried (current workarounds)

<!-- How you currently work around the absence of this feature, if at all. -->

## Sketch of the API (optional)

<!-- If you have a mental model of how the tool should be shaped, describe it.
     Tool name, params, return shape. Don't need to be precise — just enough to discuss. -->

```
pair_<new-tool>(name, ...) -> ...
```

## Anything else
